scripts.start:demo-template: npm run build:libs && ng serve demo-template --port 4201
scripts.build:libs: npm run build:contracts && ng build portfolio-ui && ng build portfolio-sdk
scripts.build:projects: npm run build:libs && ng build demo-template
scripts.build:all: npm run build:libs && ng build portfolio && ng build demo-template
scripts.test:libs: npm run build:contracts && ng test portfolio-ui --watch=false --browsers=ChromeHeadless && ng test portfolio-sdk --watch=false --browsers=ChromeHeadless
scripts.test:projects: npm run build:libs && ng test demo-template --watch=false --browsers=ChromeHeadless
